horoscope: In many ways, you would prefer to remain detached today, dear Aries, with the Moon continuing its transit of your solar eleventh house and then heading into your privacy sector. Transits encourage you to be fair and just with others, and people see you in this light. You might discover new goals, skills, and ideas as you network. Circumstances seem to frame you well. Sometimes taking a small, hopefully educated, risk can have nice payoffs. Today, a new approach may very well take things in a positive direction. The Moon moves into your solar twelfth house later today, when you may be craving more emotional space or even a little bit of anonymity.

You are a little more ambitious today, dear Taurus, and this fuels your motivation. Much of the day can feel grounded, and you may choose to get on top of practical matters. At the same time, you may be thinking about or assessing life goals and your general direction. It's a good time to take stock of recent accomplishments and envision what you'd like to do as you move ahead. There is good, creative cooperation in your private life, giving you a sense of ease and flow. The Moon's move into your friendship sector later today draws your attention to relaxing, pressure-free activities.

Today's transits make it fine for nurturing a long-term goal or plan, dear Gemini, or to think in large terms. You may very well feel a stronger sense of purpose, possibly through a learning program or special connection. There is some pleasant intensity in your relationships today, and this can be a creative, positive energy. You can feel stronger and communicate this through body language today. You are looking to move outside your routine, which can bring more interesting experiences into your life. The Moon's move to the top of your solar chart later today increases your ambitions along with your visibility.

As you zero in on problem areas today, dear Cancer, you can make significant headway with projects and even close relationships. There is a tendency to stay or operate in the background for much of the day, but you retain a lot of power in this position. In fact, your observational skills are tremendous now. You might benefit from identifying attachments that are dragging you down. It's not a day to accept things at face value; you'd rather challenge yourself and investigate them more deeply. It's also a time to allow yourself to really feel your feelings, not to detach from them. The Moon moves into your spirit sector later today, and it's a strong time to enjoy different or non-routine activities.

The Moon continues its transit of your opposing sign much of the day, dear Leo, and it's not about you temporarily, as it's about important others in your life. You might find yourself making accommodations or compromises more than usual. Problems can be solved more readily today. You have increased influence, and it's a fine time for counseling, negotiating, and interviewing. This can be a good day for cooperating with others towards a common goal. The Moon moves into your intimacy sector later today, making it a good time to process and digest recent events, and to observe rather than leap forward.

You can be very focused on handling the practical or business side of your life today, dear Virgo, but you can end the day with your social needs in stronger focus. Until then, you're thinking in terms of what is truly best for you and others. You may feel a strong urge to get everything in order, and while this can create some tension, if you focus on one thing at a time and ease up on yourself, you can be quite productive. Generally speaking, you are more inclined to make adjustments than to forge ahead with plans. This is the time for less glamorous but important work. With the Moon moving into your partnership sector later today, you may feel the need for company more than usual.

Today's energies are strong for combining the positive elements of tradition and unconventionality, dear Libra. You can be especially resourceful and open to new approaches, yet also grounded in reality. You can be feeling quite motivated, and you're ready to share yourself and connect with others. It's a favorable time for activities that come from the heart or that require expressing your feelings. Later today, you move from a playful, creative approach to a more practical focus. With the Moon moving into your solar sixth house for a stay of over two days, you prefer not to be idle, and you're ready to put the work in.

Your nesting instincts are strong again for much of today, dear Scorpio, and there's a tendency to seek emotional satisfaction and comfort through family, home, domestic activities, or familiar activities. Your more nurturing side tends to dominate now. The emphasis is on finding peace. Still, you're quite resourceful and may come up with powerful ideas for long-term plans and goals. You can benefit from looking deep within at your attachments to make important changes, to grow, and to improve. This is a good day for seeing areas that need improvement, and this can include work, home, and health matters. Later today, the Moon moves into your solar fifth house, which can turn your focus to more playful or interactive pursuits.

Learning or mental interests and projects can be in pleasant focus today, dear Sagittarius. While you're not inclined to stray too far from your regular routine today, you do feel the desire to mix things up and change the scenery enough to keep engaged and involved. You're likely to find your relationships purring along nicely as you attend to many tasks without needing to make big concessions or compromises. Look for practical ways to let loose your imagination and create wonderful things. The Moon's move to your solar fourth house later today reinforces the need for more emotional space and release from pressures, even if you want to keep very busy and engaged.

Today's transits incline you to want to slow down and savor things, dear Capricorn, although by the day's end, you're more interactive! You can be especially resourceful right now, making the most of the least or the most of what you have. Security, comfort, and safety are at the forefront. You have a tendency to want to stay rooted and could be on the inflexible side for a good portion of the day, but curiosity about the world around you picks up, and later today, you're ready to diversify. Use today for developing strategies that will benefit you in the long term, but put out your feelers as the day advances.

You tend to do your own thing, and it works for you today, dear Aquarius. Energies play well to your temperament, and you're more inclined to declare your needs, feelings, and ideas. You are looking for a little more meaning in your life, and a good conversation or bit of news can be part of your day. But while you may be getting along quite fine with others today, you may find the most satisfaction from setting your own pace. The Moon moves out of your sign later today, and some of the urgency you may have been feeling to feed your emotional needs begins to subside.

With the Moon in your solar twelfth house for a good part of the day, dear Pisces, it's a good time for low-profile activities. You can be especially preoccupied with people or situations from your past. You can feel a need to look back before you look forward and to look within or behind you if you're looking. You can very much enjoy this time of introspection right now. There is good energy for solving problems today, and there could be a financial boost. The Moon enters your sign later today, and you crave more connection with others and with the world around you.
